features.name: unconnected input causing high_z wire assignment
features.description: Code should include an unconnected input port connected to a wire, where the wire is used in a clocked process but remains uninitialized

features.name: ternary operator in combinational assignment to wire
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator used in a continuous assignment to a wire, where the condition signal changes at the same time as other signals in the same cycle

features.name: wire passed as port to instantiated module
features.description: Code should include a wire signal that is computed combinatorially and passed through a module instantiation, where the receiving module uses it in a clocked process
